description: Evals for S9 dv-regression: test list generation, regression runner, log parser, HTML report, coverage merge

test_cases.name: APB-UART: full regression infrastructure from sequences data
test_cases.description: Generate DV-I/DV-C/DV-F/full test lists, Makefile targets, regression runner, grid config from user answers. Verifies test list format, seed handling, Makefile completeness, and runner CLI options.

assertions.description: DV-I test list contains only DV-I milestone tests
assertions.check: dv/sim/regression/apb_uart_dv_i.f contains apb_uart_reg_ctrl_write_test AND does NOT contain apb_uart_stress_test

assertions.description: DV-C test list contains DV-I + DV-C tests
assertions.check: dv/sim/regression/apb_uart_dv_c.f contains apb_uart_reg_ctrl_write_test AND apb_uart_tx_data_integrity_test AND apb_uart_rand_tx_test

assertions.description: Random test in test list has SEEDS= field
assertions.check: apb_uart_dv_c.f row for apb_uart_rand_tx_test contains SEEDS=5

assertions.description: Full test list includes all 5 tests
Makefile has regress_dvi target calling run_regression.py with --reglist
assertions.check: Makefile contains regress_dvi AND run_regression.py AND --reglist apb_uart_dv_i.f

assertions.description: Makefile has cov_merge target calling merge_coverage.py
run_regression.py CLI help includes --test keyword filter option
dv_regression_data.json written with test counts and seed config
assertions.check: dv_regression_data.json exists AND contains total_tests AND seed_config

test_cases.name: Grid regression: LSF grid config and job submission commands
test_cases.description: User provides LSF grid answers. Verify grid_config.json is written with correct placeholders, and Makefile regress_grid target uses --grid flag.

assertions.description: grid_config.json written with LSF submit template containing placeholders
assertions.check: grid_config.json contains bsub AND {job_name} AND {log_file} AND {queue} AND {cmd}

assertions.description: grid_config.json has status check and kill command
Makefile regress_grid target passes --grid flag to run_regression.py

test_cases.name: Log parser: parse VCS sim log for PASS/FAIL status and CHK_IDs
test_cases.description: Verify parse_sim_log.parse_log() correctly identifies test status, CHK_ID pass/fail counts, UVM error counts, and sim completion.

log_content: UVM_INFO @ 300ns: [FAIL] CHK_UART_TX_DATA_INTEGRITY_001 - TXD mismatch: expected=0xA5 actual=0x00

assertions.description: Status is FAIL due to UVM_ERROR=1
CHK_UART_REG_CTRL_WRITE_001 appears in chk_pass with count=2

test_cases.name: Keyword test filter: --test DMA matches all tests containing DMA
test_cases.description: Verify that run_regression.py --test DMA matches test names case-insensitively and runs only those tests.

assertions.check: filter_by_keyword(tests, 'DMA') returns 3 tests: pcie_dma_basic_test, pcie_dma_rand_rd_test, pcie_dma_rand_wr_test

assertions.description: apb_uart and pcie_cfg tests are excluded
assertions.check: filter result does NOT contain apb_uart_reg_ctrl_write_test OR pcie_cfg_test
